profile.name: Musfiqur Rahman Abeg
profile.bio:
I'm Musfiqur Rahman Abeg — a CSE student at United International University, with a focused track in Cybersecurity and Artificial Intelligence.

My primary domain is cybersecurity. I study how systems are built, how they fail, and how to make them resilient. I work with offensive security concepts, vulnerability research, and security-first engineering — the technical depth that separates real security work from surface-level tool usage.

AI is my second weapon. I've worked on Data Science and machine learning projects that gave me a strong foundation in how intelligent systems are designed, trained, and deployed. That background directly informs how I approach automation, anomaly detection, and AI-assisted security tooling.

On the applied side, I have practical experience in Google Ads, SEO/GEO. I understand how digital ecosystems function end-to-end — search infrastructure, content visibility, paid acquisition, and geographic targeting. This isn't a side hobby. It's where I've developed real-world problem solving and client-facing execution skills.

Currently pursuing my degree. Actively building projects. Open to freelance, collaborative, and full-time opportunities.

services.title: Student at UIU
services.desc: Currently studying B.Sc. in Computer Science at United International University. Focus on Software Engineering and AI/ML fundamentals.

services.title: AI Automation & Development
services.desc: n8n workflows, AI pipelines, and process automation that eliminate repetitive work and scale output.

services.title: Ads and SEO
services.desc: paid, organic, and AI — engineered to compound

services.title: Cybersecurity
services.desc: Vulnerability assessment, penetration testing, and security hardening for web applications and digital infrastructure.

projects.title: SEO Forge
projects.excerpt: Automated SEO content generation and analysis system with AI integration.
projects.desc: A full-stack SEO automation platform that generates, analyzes, and optimizes content at scale. Integrates with Google Search Console and uses AI for keyword clustering and content gap analysis.

projects.title: n8n Sales Agent
projects.excerpt: Outbound sales automation pipeline with Apollo and Gmail integration.
projects.desc: An n8n-powered outbound sales pipeline that automates lead discovery via Apollo.io, personalizes outreach through AI, and fires sequenced emails via Gmail API. Reduced manual prospecting time by 80%.
